reviews.review_description: Great game but have no idea what I'm suppose to be doing once I've connected all the fuses. Am I looking for a light switch?? I spent a whole hour grabbing at every surface. Every wall, door, cupboard, everywhere. Nothing. Too frustrating.

developer_response.body: Hi Adam. In the basement there is a fuse box and in the same room there is a door. After all 4 fuses will be insert, the door will open and you can move on.

reviews.review_description: Doesn’t work correctly with the go remote can’t get past the beginning it’s a little ridiculous waste of money
I don't know what to do with the  maudit  killer.    Can't I run away of the boucher?

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thanks for the feedback.
It isn't possible to run from the butcher all the time, the main task is to hide from sight. If the butcher doesn't see you, he will not be able to catch you.

reviews.review_description:
I played it to the end. It's fun and exciting. I like it.
- From trial and error to killing many times until I understand that the game focuses on observation and search and dodge from the killer We have to find items to unlock from the house.
Very excited to hear the walk and the killer's breath and hide. I hope to receive future content updates for future replay.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thanks for the feedback. We are glad that you like this game. We will try to please you with update :)

reviews.review_description: Scary.... but confusing!  They need to have some sort of instructions on screen before the game play starts.  I literally am getting killed at the front door 2 minutes into the game.  Nice visuals and sound effects but make it more clear how to play.  I gather we are trying to avoid the butcher but how are you supposed to know when he is coming near you or when to hide?  I’ll hide in a box and then he never comes.  But then I’ll turn a corner and then he is right in my face!  Also controls could definitely be tweaked.  Maybe allow Xbox controller capability.  Has great potential!

developer_response.body: Hi Mike. Thanks for your feedback. Yes, the goal of the game is to get out of the house avoiding the butcher. You can  run away from it or hide in certain places marked with an icon. If you hear the butcher’s footsteps or his breathing, then he’s close and you need to hide. If the butcher did not see you hiding, he will look for you all over the house.

Its horror, it must be horrible :)
But could you explain, what exactly you didn't like? Maybe we can fix it.
